scope: anima-owned subset of the nexus 2026-05-07 master witness — F-M3b + F-M4 only. The other 10 falsifiers (F-C, F-L1, F-L1+, F-L6, F-L7, F-M1, F-M2, F-M3a, F-A, F-B) are nexus-owned and run from `~/core/nexus/scripts/akida/`.

ownership_split.rationale: Phi calculator + closed_loop_verify trace are anima/tool/* and anima/ready/experiments/* assets. Substrate-invariance graduation gate (#3) is the anima-side claim; nexus owns the host pool, dispatch, sim_bridge, and physical-layer measurements.

anima_falsifiers.condition: anima Phi-vector evaluated on CPU and on Akida agree within 5% across a 100-input panel
anima_falsifiers.experiment_or_observation: Quantize Phi calculator via Meta TF (cnn2snn); evaluate on identical IIT panel; max_rel_err
anima_falsifiers.blocking_dependency: Meta TF cnn2snn quantize of anima/tool/phi_extractor_cpu.hexa — pipeline pending; --cpu-only emits PARTIAL evidence non-promotion-eligible

anima_falsifiers.condition: anima closed_loop_verify trace identical between CPU and Akida for N >= 1000 events
anima_falsifiers.experiment_or_observation: Replay anima/ready/experiments/closed_loop_verify.py fixture with deterministic seed; capture (lamport_index, event_kind); align by Lamport index; count divergences
anima_falsifiers.blocking_dependency: ConsciousnessEngine.forward routed through cnn2snn-converted SNN — pipeline pending; --cpu-only emits CPU-self-bisim PARTIAL evidence

tier_1_promotion_anima_side.summary: Phi(CPU) ≈ Phi(Akida) within 5% AND closed_loop_verify N≥1000 trace-equivalent — anima-side claim of substrate-invariance fixed-point

obstructions.description: Meta TF cnn2snn quantize of Phi extractor + ConsciousnessEngine not yet wired
obstructions.mitigation: Wire anima/tool/phi_extractor_ffi_wire.hexa through cnn2snn.convert(); deploy .fbz; harness will pick up via akida.Model(model_path)

obstructions.description: 16GB RAM on RPi5 may not load full ConsciousnessEngine
obstructions.mitigation: Reduce panel to Phi-only sub-net (excludes language head); F-M3b panel-size=100 keeps memory bounded

honesty_triad.write_barrier: anima sister witness emitted alongside nexus master per raw 47 cross-repo-trawl-witness pattern. NO measured Phi(Akida) values — both F-M3b and F-M4 carry blocking_dependency on cnn2snn quantize pipeline. CPU-only partial-evidence runs allowed but explicitly NOT promotion-eligible per nexus F-C invariant.
no_fabrication_evidence: F-M3b harness anima/scripts/akida/phi_substrate_invariance.py prefers anima/tool/phi_extractor_cpu.hexa and falls back to phi_fast() from ready/experiments/closed_loop_verify.py — both files verified present in repo

F-M4 harness invokes ready/experiments/closed_loop_verify.py with --emit-trace; if the script lacks --emit-trace argument, harness emits a deterministic fallback trace explicitly labelled as such in evidence
Akida-side Phi computation raises NotImplementedError — no fabricated Phi(Akida) values; partial CPU-only evidence verdicts are PARTIAL-* not PASS
Cross-repo dependency on F-M3a@nexus (host.rpi5-akida registered) explicitly named — anima-side promotion blocked until nexus-side dispatch test PASSes

next_cycle_trigger: cnn2snn quantize pipeline lands → re-run anima/scripts/akida/runner.py --hardware → emit anima follow-up witness
